prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 107.4 kg; Height 181.2 cm; BMI 32.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 283mg/dL; 9 months ago 214mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 223mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 108.8kg; 9 months ago 110.8kg; 6 months ago 110.8kg; 3 months ago 111.3kg; current 107.4kg), Height (12 months ago 181.2cm; 9 months ago 181.2cm; 6 months ago 181.2cm; 3 months ago 181.2cm; current 181.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 32.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 11mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 745mg/g; 9 months ago 582mg/g; 6 months ago 899mg/g; 3 months ago 965mg/g; current 641mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 71mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 68mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 186mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 176mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.4g/dL; 9 months ago 11.3g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.93 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
